title: Lead Generation Channel Mix Mini-Guide for Early-Stage Startups
description: Early-stage startup founders use this concise framework to evaluate, prioritize, and sequence their first three lead generation channels based on their sales cycle length, deal size, and current team bandwidth.
gumroad_description:
LEAD GENERATION CHANNEL MIX MINI-GUIDE FOR EARLY-STAGE STARTUPS

You're drowning in lead generation advice but have zero idea which channels actually fit your startup right now.

This guide cuts through the noise. It gives you a decision framework to evaluate inbound, outbound, and partnership channels based on three things that actually matter: your sales cycle, your deal size, and how many people you have. Then it tells you which to start with, which to layer in second, and which to ignore for now.

BUILT FOR

— Founders who've launched product but haven't nailed repeatable customer acquisition yet
— Sales leaders at pre-Series A companies running lean with 2-4 person teams
— Anyone tired of generic "10 lead gen tactics" lists that don't account for their constraints

WHAT'S INSIDE

— A one-page framework that maps your startup's profile to channels that work
— Sequencing logic so you don't waste months testing everything at once
— Red flags that tell you when a channel is wrong for your stage
— A quick-reference decision tree you can use today with your actual numbers

This isn't theory. It's the thinking we've used to help founders go from "what do we do first" to running their first real pipeline in weeks.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
